### Flexible car, van and minibus hire in [Maidstone](https://www.jjrentals.co.uk/maidstone), Kent and [Horsham](https://www.jjrentals.co.uk/horsham) in Surrey.

## Reliable vehicle hire for business, leisure and everyday transport, with clear pricing and flexible hire periods

![Fleet of rental vans and trucks](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65ca3b3b1b0263790e320296/57cf461b-aef6-4f14-b893-30c11465df6a/vehicles-01.jpg)

![White check mark on green background](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65ca3b3b1b0263790e320296/ba7b8a6e-d29c-4180-a575-0987dd3a633c/tick-icon.png)

![White check mark on green background](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65ca3b3b1b0263790e320296/ba7b8a6e-d29c-4180-a575-0987dd3a633c/tick-icon.png)

### Quality Assured

All of our vehicles are kept in tip-top condition to ensure our customers enjoy a stress-free rental experience.

### Travelling to Europe?

We can take care of all the extra insurance and documentation required.

### Fully Insured

All our hires come with insurance, road fund license and 24hr roadside assistance.

### Affordable

Cheap rate vehicle hire guaranteed with low deposits to keep things affordable.

![White check mark on green background](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65ca3b3b1b0263790e320296/ba7b8a6e-d29c-4180-a575-0987dd3a633c/tick-icon.png)

![White check mark on green background](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65ca3b3b1b0263790e320296/ba7b8a6e-d29c-4180-a575-0987dd3a633c/tick-icon.png)

### All Sizes Available

We have vehicles to suit every need from Luton, Transit and Tail lift vans to cars, minibuses and pick up trucks.

### Flexible Hire

With out of hours returns & telematics systems, you can return the vehicle with peace of mind.

![White check mark on green background](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65ca3b3b1b0263790e320296/ba7b8a6e-d29c-4180-a575-0987dd3a633c/tick-icon.png)

![White check mark on green background](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65ca3b3b1b0263790e320296/ba7b8a6e-d29c-4180-a575-0987dd3a633c/tick-icon.png)

[Find your perfect vehicle](https://www.jjrentals.co.uk/vehicle-hire)

# Low cost van hire

**JJ Rentals** provides flexible car, van and minibus hire from convenient locations across Kent and Surrey. Whether you need a vehicle for a day, a week or longer, we offer modern, well-maintained vehicles at competitive prices, with insurance and roadside assistance included. Our friendly staff will help get you on the move as quickly as possible and will happily answer any questions regarding the rental process.

## Book online for the best prices!
